meta.poznamky: sketch_code používá PenDown/PenUp - přesun mezi dvěma trojúhelníky nesmí kreslit

cms.task_text: Kód má nakreslit [hlp]dva oddělené trojúhelníky[/hlp]. Doplňte blok, který pero zvedne při přesunu mezi nimi.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
